allow:
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial scaffold: Next.js 16 + Cloudflare Pages stack

- Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind
- Cloudflare Pages deployment via @cloudflare/next-on-pages
- wrangler.toml configured with R2, D1, and KV bindings
- Build/deploy scripts wired in package.json
- Full product specification in SPEC.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(git add wrangler.toml SPEC.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Provision Cloudflare resources and update spec

- Wire real D1, KV, and R2 IDs into wrangler.toml
- Update SPEC.md: CI/CD via Cloudflare Pages native \(no GitHub Actions\)
- Add §7 Multi-Tenancy & Branding: hardcoded per-agency themes,
  United Agents as V1 demo target with brand tokens
- Tick off completed Phase 0 infra tasks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)
